"'''101 Battle Neks'''" was one of the canceled ''[[Bungo n' Rusti]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] by [[James Anderson]]. In the story, [[Bungo Bung]] was to have been given one hundred [[Nek/Legends|Nek]] pups to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] off of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was later published unofficially on [[TheForce.net]].<ref name="TFN">{{WebCite|url=https://www.theforce.net/comics/fancomics/bungo&rusti/index.shtml|text=Bungo and Rusti Star Wars Comics!|author=[[James Anderson]]|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20210725123043}}</ref>
